basic_details.job_title: NIPER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow and Project Scientist I Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research (NIPER)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow and Project Scientist-I
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research (NIPER) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Project Scientist-I Notification 2026 has been released on 30 June 2026 on the official website of NIPER. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NIPER Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Project Scientist-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: As per GoI norms; relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC, physically handicapped and women applicants for Project Scientist-I
age_limit.details: All Posts: As per GoI norms; relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC, physically handicapped and women applicants for Project Scientist-I.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree (M.S.(Pharm.)/M.Pharm./M.Sc.) in Medicinal Chemistry/Pharmaceutical Chemistry/Chemistry/Process Chemistry, Ph.D. in Synthetic Organic Chemistry/Medicinal Chemistry/Pharmaceutical Chemistry/Process Chemistry
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Postgraduate degree (M.S.(Pharm.)/M.Pharm./M.Sc.) in Medicinal Chemistry/Pharmaceutical Chemistry/Chemistry/Process Chemistry from a recognized University/Institute with minimum 60% marks or CGPA 6.75, cleared GPAT/GATE/CSIR-NET or any National entrance test. Project Scientist-I: Ph.D. in Synthetic Organic Chemistry/Medicinal Chemistry/Pharmaceutical Chemistry/Process Chemistry with at least one research publication in standard referred journal/SCI journal.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000 + 20% HRA Project Scientist-I: Rs. 56,000 + 20% HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIPER Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIPER to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.national_institute_of_pharmaceutical_edu: Junior Research Fellow and Project Scientist-I

Postgraduate degree (M.S.(Pharm.)/M.Pharm./M.Sc.) in Medicinal Chemistry/Pharmaceutical Chemistry/Chemistry/Process Chemistry, Ph.D. in Synthetic Organic Chemistry/Medicinal Chemistry/Pharmaceutical Chemistry/Process Chemistry
As per GoI norms; relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC, physically handicapped and women applicants for Project Scientist-I

content_sections.heading: NIPER Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIPER Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIPER Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIPER Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Postgraduate degree (M.S.(Pharm.)/M.Pharm./M.Sc.) in Medicinal Chemistry/Pharmaceutical Chemistry/Chemistry/Process Chemistry from a recognized University/Institute with minimum 60% marks or CGPA 6.75, cleared GPAT/GATE/CSIR-NET or any National entrance test. Project Scientist-I: Ph.D. in Synthetic Organic Chemistry/Medicinal Chemistry/Pharmaceutical Chemistry/Process Chemistry with at least one research publication in standard referred journal/SCI journal.

content_sections.heading: NIPER Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: All Posts: As per GoI norms; relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC, physically handicapped and women applicants for Project Scientist-I.

content_sections.heading: NIPER Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000 + 20% HRA Project Scientist-I: Rs. 56,000 + 20% HRA

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIPER Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIPER to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIPER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NIPER Junior Research Fellow and Project Scientist-I posts is 15th July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellow position, candidates need a Postgraduate degree (M.S.(Pharm.)/M.Pharm./M.Sc.) in relevant fields and must have cleared GPAT/GATE/CSIR-NET or a similar national entrance test.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for NIPER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist-I position?
faq.answer: The Project Scientist-I will receive a salary of Rs. 56,000 per month, plus 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these NIPER posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for both Junior Research Fellow and Project Scientist-I posts will be based on an interview, which will be conducted in a hybrid mode, allowing for both physical and online participation.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates from outside Assam apply for this NIPER recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Assam. However, it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for NIPER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the NIPER Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official website or the provided online application link.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms. Specifically, up to 5 years relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC, physically handicapped, and women applicants for the Project Scientist-I post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies released by NIPER?
faq.answer: NIPER has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the posts of Junior Research Fellow and Project Scientist-I in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official NIPER Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for NIPER Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the "Important Links" section provided in this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" heading.
